---
title : "Measurement {{Strategy}} for {{SDG Global Indicator}} 4.7.1 and {{Themat}} Ic {{Indicators}} 4.7.4 and 4.7.5 Using {{International Large}} - {{Scale Assessments}} in {{Education}}"
date : "2019-01-01"
author : "Sandoval-Hernandez, Andres; Miranda, Daniel & Isac, Maria Magdalena"
categories : ["Report"]
publication : " "
publication_short : " "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Sandoval-Hernandez, Andres; Miranda, Daniel & Isac, Maria Magdalena (2019). *Measurement {{Strategy}} for {{SDG Global Indicator}} 4.7.1 and {{Themat}} Ic {{Indicators}} 4.7.4 and 4.7.5 Using {{International Large}} - {{Scale Assessments}} in {{Education}}*.  

:::
